creator: shoesoft@gmx.net
text:
After the latest change (r487789 by zeising), the version of x11-servers/xwayland goes from 1.19.1_10,1 to 1.19.1_1,1.

The same issue occurred in September. See commit message of r479663:
"Remove portrevision, it's inherited from master.  Adding it here made it go
backwards."
